caption: A green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) is parked inside a garage or shed. The ATV features a large green storage box mounted on the front rack, a headlight, and chunky off-road tires. A person wearing dark blue jeans is seated on the vehicle, though only their lower body and legs are clearly visible. The scene is captured from a low angle, looking up at the front of the vehicle. Across the sequence, the camera remains largely stationary, though there is a slight shift in the perspective and lighting. The person on the ATV remains still, and the vehicle does not move. The background consists of a dimly lit interior with a bright opening to the outdoors on the left side, and other equipment or vehicle parts are partially visible in the periphery. There is no on-screen text or logos visible.
